x-enumeration-literals.name: BalanceTransferPromoEnd
x-enumeration-literals.description: The date the balance transfer promo rate will end.

x-enumeration-literals.name: DirectDebitDue
x-enumeration-literals.description: The date that the direct debit payment is due for the current statement.

x-enumeration-literals.name: LastPayment
x-enumeration-literals.description: The date that an account holder must make the payment for the previous statement period.

x-enumeration-literals.name: LastStatement
x-enumeration-literals.description: The date on which the last statement was made available to account holder.

x-enumeration-literals.name: NextStatement
x-enumeration-literals.description: The date on which the next statement will be made available to account holder.

x-enumeration-literals.name: PaymentDue
x-enumeration-literals.description: The date that an account holder must make the payment for the current statement period.

x-enumeration-literals.name: PurchasePromoEnd
x-enumeration-literals.description: The date the purchase promo rate will end.

x-enumeration-literals.name: StatementAvailable
x-enumeration-literals.description: The date on which the current statement was made available to account holder.
